title: aurinia cyclocarpa
intro: Aurinia cyclocarpa, also known as the Alpine Sweet Rocket or Cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aurinia cyclocarpa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aurinia cyclocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
